recommendation_block:
RESUME RECOMMENDATION: THE NUCLEAR COMPANY — AI ENGINEER 1

1. KEYWORD MATCH ANALYSIS
Candidate resume variant scores:
- DarisChenResumeAI.pdf: 85/100 ← RECOMMENDED
- DarisChenResumeSWE.pdf: 82/100
- DarisChenResumeWD.pdf: 80/100
- DarisChenResumeEE.pdf: 72/100

Top two variants separated by only 3 points, requiring full analysis. AI resume wins on AI-assisted tooling depth and ML/AI workflow demonstration.

2. TECHNICAL ALIGNMENT
AI Resume explicitly addresses all required qualifications:
- Python proficiency: Lead at PatentIQ (FastAPI, semantic search engine), FishSense (R-CNN pipeline, Detectron2), FlipperZillow (DFormerV2, DepthAnythingV2)
- C++/TypeScript: Cython optimization, TypeScript in projects (Next.js stack), C++ legal move generation in chess engine
- SQL fundamentals: PostgreSQL pgvector, recursive SQL query builder, database architecture across multiple roles
- AI-assisted development tools: Explicit Claude Sonnet 4.6 integration (FlipperZillow), Anthropic SDK with prompt caching (Career-Ops), mentions OpenAI + Claude across stack
- Data pipeline/ETL: FishSense custom R-CNN pipeline (40% inference speedup), Detectron2 standardization, Personify AI data ingestion pipeline with NLP-based feature extraction and deduplication
- Cloud environment (AWS): EC2, S3, Vercel deployment experience

3. PREFERRED QUALIFICATIONS COVERAGE
- 1-3 years work experience: 3 distinct engineering roles (PatentIQ lead, Groundwork Books lead, Personify AI intern) + 2 research positions spanning 2025–2026
- Coursework/projects in 3D simulation: FlipperZillow (Three.js 3D experience, WebSpatial Vision Pro integration, DFormerV2 spatial analysis)
- Geospatial/3D modeling: DFormerV2 depth-anything modeling, WebSpatial 3D object extraction (SAM3D), Google Maps integration in FlipperZillow
- Open-source/hackathons: FishSense is published research (UCSD Engineers for Exploration, academic reproducibility focus)
- ML/AI workflows: R-CNN training pipelines, Detectron2 codebase standardization, neural network optimization (chess engine NNUE network), training-data preparation (FishSense biological metrics extraction)
- Orchestration patterns: Career-Ops Pipeline demonstrates conductor-worker-judge architecture, parallel processing, structured schema enforcement via retry loops

4. CONFIDENCE LEVEL
HIGH CONFIDENCE (92%)

Reasoning:
- Candidate is actively using Claude API/SDK in production (FlipperZillow, Career-Ops) — core Nuclear Company differentiator
- Demonstrated ability to optimize ML pipelines for real-world constraints (40% speedup, reproducibility)
- Hands-on 3D/spatial work (WebSpatial, Three.js, DepthAnythingV2) directly maps to "3D simulation and visualization work"
- Recent experience (2025–2026) shows currency with latest AI tools and frameworks
- Computer Engineering degree (not just CS) suggests systems thinking
- Only concern: No explicit Unreal Engine or Unity experience, but Three.js/WebSpatial/DFormerV2 demonstrate transferable 3D/graphics fundamentals

5. TOP SIGNALS & PROOF POINTS

1. "Anthropic prompt caching of cv.md and 4 resume PDFs across worker subagents" (Career-Ops Pipeline project)
   - Directly demonstrates mastery of modern AI-assisted development tooling
   - Shows understanding of LLM optimization and cost reduction
   - Proves ability to architect scalable AI systems

2. "AI house tour platform named FlipperZillow using Next.js and Claude for semantic search, piping DFormerV2 spatial analysis into Claude Sonnet 4.6"
   - Shows Claude integration at the application level
   - Demonstrates 3D/spatial reasoning (directly relevant to simulation work)
   - Proves rapid prototyping with AI-assisted coding

3. "Developed a custom R-CNN training pipeline (ResNet-50 backbone) for underwater laser-profiling, standardizing the Detectron2 codebase, reducing inference setup time by 40%" (FishSense)
   - Quantifiable ML/AI workflow improvement
   - Reproducibility focus aligns with research-driven nuclear industry
   - Hands-on experience with deep learning frameworks

4. "Orchestrated Agile development workflows via ClickUp for a 14 member cross functional team while serving as lead architect" (PatentIQ)
   - Leadership in technical environments
   - Experience with large team coordination
   - Direct relevance to "15 highly motivated and talented engineers" hiring

5. "Composed a hybrid chess engine combining HalfKP NNUE neural network with advanced alpha-beta search"
   - Shows ability to blend classical algorithms with neural approaches
   - Performance optimization mindset (77.2% latency reduction)
   - Systems-level thinking about inference efficiency

6. FORM FIELD RECOMMENDATIONS
Application form fields:
- Required: First/Last Name, Email, Phone, Country, Resume/CV, Education, GitHub/Portfolio, Work authorization, Visa sponsorship, Restrictive covenants
- Optional: Cover Letter, LinkedIn Profile, How did you hear

Recommended values:
- Resume: Upload DarisChenResumeAI.pdf
- Portfolio: github.com/darischen
- How did you hear: "Career portal search" or "LinkedIn job posting"
- Work authorization: "Yes, US Citizen"
- Visa sponsorship: "No"
- Restrictive covenants: "No"

7. RISK ASSESSMENT
Minimal risks with this match:
- No explicit Unreal Engine/Unity experience: LOW (Three.js, WebSpatial, DFormerV2 demonstrate transferable 3D skills)
- Recent graduate (2026 spring): LOW (Hired as "AI Engineer 1" junior title; shows 1+ years engineering work)
- San Francisco location, relocation required: LOW (JD explicitly welcomes relocation)
- No Palantir Foundry experience: VERY LOW (Preferred qualification; Career-Ops Pipeline shows equivalent orchestration)

8. FINAL RECOMMENDATION
SUBMIT with DarisChenResumeAI.pdf

Strong fit (92% confidence) for The Nuclear Company's AI Engineer 1 role. Candidate demonstrates:
1. Production-level Claude/Anthropic SDK usage (rare and valuable)
2. Real-world ML/AI pipeline optimization experience
3. 3D/spatial systems thinking (FlipperZillow, WebSpatial)
4. Data pipeline architecture and ETL fundamentals
5. Full-stack capability (Python, TypeScript, SQL, cloud infrastructure)
6. Leadership in cross-functional teams

The role emphasizes "AI-assisted coding" and "training AI systems at the core of our mission" — candidate's Career-Ops Pipeline and FlipperZillow projects directly demonstrate those capabilities. FishSense R-CNN work shows ability to contribute meaningfully to ML infrastructure. Recent graduation provides flexibility for relocation and rapid Unreal Engine learning.

Proceed with application. High recommended.
